title: Columnea poortmannii
taxonomy: Columnea poortmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Columnea, which consists of a wide variety of epiphytic plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Columnea poortmannii is a type of flowering plant that is known for its vibrant and colorful blooms. The species Columnea poortmannii is classified within the order Lamiales, which includes a diverse group of flowering plants. Additionally, it can be further classified as a member of the tribe Gesnerieae, a group of flowering plants known for their unique characteristics and growth habits.
